Your complete WordPress control panel.

Replace 10+ separate admin plugins with a single, fast, React-powered interface. Plugin manager, database tools, file manager, security scanner, and more — all in one place.

Free & open-source · WordPress 5.9+ · PHP 7.4+ · GPL-2.0

WP Manager Pro — WordPress Admin

Plugins

12 Powerful Modules

Everything your site needs,
in one place

WP Manager Pro bundles a full suite of professional WordPress tools into a single, blazing-fast React interface. No more plugin sprawl.

🔌

Plugin Manager

Install, activate, deactivate, update, and delete plugins. Search WordPress.org directly from your control panel.

🎨

Theme Manager

Browse, install, activate, and delete themes without leaving the panel. Preview before switching.

📁

File Manager

Browse and edit files directly. Syntax-aware code editor for PHP, JavaScript, CSS, and more.

🗄️

Database Manager

Browse tables, run SQL queries, and perform search & replace with full serialized data support.

🛡️

Security Scanner

Scan for malware patterns, inspect suspicious files, quarantine or delete threats with one click.

🔒

Security Suite

Login limiter, IP blocklist, 2FA (TOTP), XML-RPC control, and file integrity monitoring.

🧰

Agency Tools

White-label login page, coming soon mode, client report generator, and mail interceptor.

⚡

Performance

DB cleanup, transient manager, object cache status, Redis browser, and caching controls.

🕐

Cron Manager

Browse scheduled events, trigger manually, add custom schedules, and monitor cron health.

👥

User Manager

List users, change roles, and login-as any user with safe impersonation. Full audit control.

🛠️

Debug Tools

Toggle WP_DEBUG flags, view error logs live, and get a full system info overview at a glance.

🖼️

Image Tools

WebP/AVIF conversion toggle, bulk thumbnail regeneration, JPEG quality and compression settings.

The Case for WP Manager Pro

Why WP Manager Pro?

Stop juggling a dozen plugins. Manage your entire WordPress site from one powerful panel.

⚡

React-powered speed

Built as a single-page React application, WP Manager Pro feels instant. No full-page reloads — navigate between tools at the speed of thought.

🎯

Built for agencies

White-label the login page, generate client reports, intercept emails in staging, and manage multiple aspects of a site without context-switching.

🧹

Declutter your WP Admin

Eliminate the sprawl. Replace Wordfence, WP-DBManager, Filester, WP Crontrol, and 8+ other plugins with a single, well-maintained codebase.

🔓

Free and open-source

No licensing fees, no upsells, no SaaS subscriptions. WP Manager Pro is GPL-2.0 licensed and maintained transparently on GitHub.

Without
With WP Manager Pro
Plugins needed
8–12 separate plugins
1
Admin pages
Scattered across WP menu
Single unified panel
Performance
Bloat from multiple plugins
Lightweight React SPA
Updates
Manage each separately
Central update hub
Learning curve
Different UI for each tool
One consistent interface

Comparison based on typical WordPress agency setups using popular free plugins.

Quick Setup

Up and running in 60 seconds

No configuration wizards, no API keys, no complex setup. Just download, install, and go.

1

Download

Grab the latest release ZIP from GitHub. No accounts, no registration — just a clean ZIP file ready to go.

Get latest release →
2

Install

In your WordPress admin, go to Plugins → Add New → Upload Plugin. Select the ZIP, click Install Now, then Activate.

3

Manage

Click "WP Manager" in your admin sidebar and you're in. The full control panel loads instantly in your browser.

Requirements 🌐 WordPress 5.9 or higher 🐘 PHP 7.4 or higher 🔑 Administrator role 🪝 REST API enabled
Release Notes

What's new

Actively developed and regularly updated. Here's what landed recently.

v2.9.4 Latest
2026-03-18
  • Media Library modal deep root-cause fix — resolves iframe isolation issues
  • Switched to IIFE build format for improved WordPress compatibility
  • Eliminated all module-type script loading conflicts
  • Cleaned up asset enqueuing and dependency chain
Download v2.9.4
v2.9.3
2026-03-17
  • Image Tools: fixed conversion settings persistence and toggle behavior
  • Malware Scanner: full inspect, quarantine, delete, and ignore actions
  • Sidebar environment badge completely redesigned — cleaner, smaller
  • UI polish across scanner results and action dialogs
v2.9.2
2026-03-17
  • WordPress Media Library bridge — native media picker now works inside plugin iframe
  • Settings branding: logo picker using native WP media selector
  • Fixed media picker button visibility and selection callback
View full changelog

Free & open-source WordPress management suite. Replace a dozen admin plugins with one powerful, React-powered control panel.
